summary.sosovalue: Low volume of community mentions excluding official accounts, primarily promotional, referral farming for SoPoints/$SOSO airdrop, and neutral shares of SoSoValue insights. Sentiment neutral to mildly positive with enthusiasm around airdrops and platform utility.

summary.ssi: Very sparse mentions, likely referring to SSI Index (e.g., MAG7.SSI); one positive note on 3% 24hr gain. Overall neutral due to low activity.
